text:
よ、ようやく終わりましたわね……！
私、何度か昇天しかかりましたわ！

貴方様との探索は楽しいのですけれども
後半は全く付いていけませんでしたわ。

まだまだ精進しなければなりませんね。
取り敢えず帰還いたしましょう。
干上がって

It's... It's finally over! I was close to
kicking the bucket a few times there!

It's fun going on expeditions with you and all,
but... towards the end I definitely couldn't
keep up with you at all.

I have to just keep giving my training my all.
In any case, let's head back. I'm about to
collapse into a pile of dust.
